title: draba pygmaea
intro: Draba pygmaea, also known as pygmy draba or small draba, is a species of flowering plant in the family Brassicaceae. It is a small, annual herb with leaves that are often rounded and stemless. Draba pygmaea has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever and pain, and it is often prepared as a tea or infused in oil for herbal remedies.
